scores.notes: The text accuracy is very good with no obvious misspellings. Numeric precision is also high. Layout preservation is good, maintaining the general flow. However, the table structure has some issues where the additional charges and associated details are not clearly aligned under their respective columns, making it difficult to parse programmatically. Some empty cells in the table are represented by '| |' which is acceptable but not ideal for perfect structure. The completeness is high, with all visible text captured.
